purpose: PDF-free runnable source workflow archive plus LLM/PhysiCell audit artifacts and final-report article Excel.
runnable_scope: Source code, tests, scripts, configs, metadata fixtures, and audit artifacts are included. Full PDFs, secrets, compiled PhysiCell binaries, and raw large simulation outputs are excluded.
runtime_time_policy: Absolute runtime date/time values are set to null in the public workflow archive; call IDs, prompt hashes, dependency order, validation status, durations, and artifact paths are preserved.
